title: Meet our Elevate '24 content expert & share your feedback with us!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
The countdown to Elevate '24 is on, and it’s time to spotlight the superstars who are tirelessly working to ensure that this year’s Elevate conference is the best yet!

First up, meet Rebecca, our Elevate content lead!

Rebecca is always on the move, collaborating nonstop with our speakers to shape insightful sessions. When she’s not in a brainstorm, she’s busy crafting our promotional materials and attendee communications.

Rebecca’s secret to managing all of the details? Her go-to Global Agenda board, tracking every piece of Elevate’24 content, across locations and their statuses! And her personal favorite from this year’s content? The customer story by Horizon Media!

Group 12611644262160×1080 269 KB

Here’s where you come in. As someone who lives and breathes Elevate content, Rebecca is your go-to person for any feedback or insights. Your thoughts can help shape Elevate’24! So don’t hesitate to share ↓↓↓↓↓↓

Check out the full agenda + more information here
